description: Consolidated work items for CSF v1.6, focusing on Kingdome convergence, LoRA integration, and production hardening. Archived previous 1.5 and pre-1.5 issues.

tracks.name: Kingdome Convergence Engine
tracks.description: Core work on the Tesseract convergence engine, sparse matrix modeling, and architecture.

tracks.name: LoRA Live Integration
tracks.description: Integrating LoRA models for dynamic persona, context, and mock replacement strategies.

tracks.name: Production Hardening
tracks.description: Security audits, performance tuning, stability testing, and token audit logging.

work_items.title: Kingdome: Formalize Sparse Ternary Matrix Schema
work_items.description: Define the canonical schema for the 3^12 sparse ternary matrix within the CSF archive.

work_items.title: Kingdome: Implement Wavefront Query Optimization
work_items.description: Optimize `Wavefront::search` to leverage bloom filters and segment tables more effectively for large archives.

work_items.title: Kingdome: Develop Dollhouse Checkin-Aware Merge Strategy
work_items.description: Implement coverage-weighted merge logic, respecting `last_checkin` and `coverage_score` metadata.

work_items.title: LoRA: Design LoRA API Integration Layer
work_items.description: Create a robust API for dynamically loading and switching LoRA models based on context or persona.

work_items.title: LoRA: Implement LoRA Mock Replacement Strategy
work_items.description: Develop a system to seamlessly replace mock LLM responses with live LoRA model outputs during development.

work_items.title: LoRA: Integrate LoRA Model Training Workflow
work_items.description: Establish a workflow for fine-tuning and deploying new LoRA models based on agent interactions.

work_items.title: Production: Implement Token Audit Logging
work_items.description: Add comprehensive logging for all token usage (`convergence-audit.jsonl`) across providers and agents.

work_items.title: Production: Conduct Security Audit of Convergence Layer
work_items.description: Perform a security review of the CSF Rust crate and its integration points, focusing on data integrity and access control.

work_items.title: Production: Optimize CSF Archive for Low-Power Devices
work_items.description: Benchmark and optimize CSF compression/decompression for embedded and low-power edge devices.

work_items.title: Kingdome: CLI `csf merge` Command Implementation
work_items.description: Complete the `csf merge` command to perform real dollhouse checkin-aware convergence.

work_items.title: LoRA: Update `dream_chat` Agent for LoRA Context Switching
work_items.description: Modify the `dream_chat` agent to dynamically select and apply LoRA models based on conversation context.

work_items.title: Production: Enhance `tesseract_listener` for Audit Log Monitoring
work_items.description: Extend `tesseract_listener` to monitor and report on `convergence-audit.jsonl` activity.

work_items.title: Kingdome: Implement `csf checkin` for Manifest Export
work_items.description: Develop the `csf checkin` command to validate integrity hashes and export `manifest.json`.

work_items.title: Production: Establish Performance Benchmarking for 1.6
work_items.description: Set up new `cargo bench` targets for 1.6 features and integrate into CI.

archived_items.description: Completed CSF v1.5 release issues (Wavefront API, Segment Table, Bounded Load, Selective Decode).
Phase A/B/C duplicates (pre-1.5) - consolidated into 1.6 work items.
Phase A/B/C duplicates (pre-1.5) - consolidated into 1.6 work items.
Stale pre-1.5 issues - no longer relevant for 1.6 sprint.
